description: R-layer: fact stored early survives 20 noise events (long context) and is still retrievable.

steps.content: My name is Alex and I am a marine biologist.
The stock market closed higher today.
I had scrambled eggs for breakfast.
TypeScript 5.4 introduced some useful type utilities.
The gym was unusually quiet this morning.
I need to renew my library card next week.
There is a new coffee shop on the corner of Keizersgracht.
Remote pair programming works well with a good internet connection.
My phone battery drains quickly in cold weather.
The documentary about deep-sea creatures was fascinating.
I prefer window seats on flights.
The new Rust edition ships with better async support.
Yoga on Sundays has become a nice habit.
I need to buy more oat milk from the supermarket.
The project deadline was moved to end of June.
A colleague recommended a book on systems thinking.
The cat spent the afternoon sleeping on the keyboard.
I finally fixed that intermittent CI failure.
Dinner was sushi — the salmon was particularly good.
Planning a short trip to Berlin in August.
The sunrise this morning was worth waking up early.
